transcript: Speaker A: एक सिलेंडर कैसे दे रहे हो भैया? [How much for one cylinder, brother?] Speaker B: It will cost you five thousand rupees. Speaker A: पांच हजार रुपये? ये तो बहुत कॉस्टली है। [Five thousand rupees? That's very costly.] Speaker B: Yes, gas cylinder prices have skyrocketed these days. Speaker A: हां वो तो है, पर भैया आप इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे बोल रहे हो? [Yes, that's true, but brother, how are you speaking such good English?] Speaker B: अरे, वो मैं MySivi ऐप यूज़ करता हूँ ना। [Oh, I use the MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi ऐप? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?] Speaker B: MySivi ऐप में एक AI इंग्लिश टीचर है जो बिना किसी जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कराती है, मिस्टेक करो तो तुरंत करेक्ट कर देती है। [In the MySivi app, there is an AI English teacher who helps you practice English without any judgment, and if you make a mistake, she corrects it instantly.] Speaker A: पर ये तो महंगा होगा ना? [But this must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं, मैंने सिर्फ एक रुपये में शुरू किया था। रोज़ बस 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस की एंड माय इंग्लिश इस गेटिंग बेटर एंड बेटर एवरीडे। [Not at all, I started for just one rupee. Just practiced 10-15 minutes daily and my English is getting better and better everyday.] Speaker A: वाओ, फिर तो मुझे भी ये ऐप ट्राई करना चाहिए। [Wow, then I should also try this app.] Speaker B: बिल्कुल, बस इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो एंड 15 डेज इंग्लिश लर्निंग चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Absolutely, just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start the 15 days English learning challenge.]
on_screen_text: EK CYLINDER DE RAHE HO BHAIYA? [How much for one cylinder, brother?] IT WILL COST FIVE THOUSAND RUPEES. PAANCH HAZAR YE TOH VERY COSTLY [Five thousand, this is very costly]. YES, GAS CYLINDER PRICES HAVE SKYROCKETED THESE DAYS. HAAN WO TOH HAI PAR BHAIYA ITNI ACHHI ENGLISH KAISE BOL RAHE HO? [Yes, that's true, but brother, how are you speaking such good English?] ARE, WOH MAIN MYSIVI APP USE KARTA HOON NA. [Oh, I use the MySivi app.] MYSIVI APP? WOH KYA HAI? [MySivi app? What is that?] MySivi. MYSIVI APP MEIN EK AI ENGLISH TEACHER HAI JO BINA KISI JUDGEMENT KE ENGLISH PRACTICE KARATI HAI, MISTAKE KARO TOH TURANT CORRECT KAR DETI HAI. [In the MySivi app, there is an AI English teacher who helps you practice English without any judgment, and if you make a mistake, she corrects it instantly.] PAR YE TOH MEHNGA HOGA NA? [But this must be expensive, right?] BILKUL NAHI, MAINE SIRF EK RUPEE MEIN SHURU KIYA THA, ROZ BAS 10-15 MINUTE PRACTICE KI AND MY ENGLISH IS GETTING BETTER AND BETTER EVERYDAY. [Not at all, I started for just one rupee. Just practiced 10-15 minutes daily and my English is getting better and better everyday.] WOW, PHIR TOH MUJHE BHI YE APP TRY KARNA CHAHIYE. [Wow, then I should also try this app.] BILKUL, BAS INSTALL BUTTON PE CLICK KARO, MYSIVI APP INSTALL KARO AND 15 DAYS ENGLISH LEARNING CHALLENGE SHURU KARO. [Absolutely, just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start the 15 days English learning challenge.]
summary: A customer is surprised when a gas delivery man speaks fluent English. The delivery man credits his skills to the MySivi app, which offers instant AI corrections and daily practice for just ₹1. He encourages the viewer to download the app and start a 15-day challenge.
